headline: How The Sysco (SYY) Story Is Shifting With Restaurant Depot And Trimmed Fair Value
summary: Sysco’s modeled Fair Value was trimmed from US$90.80 to US$87.73, a reduction of about 3.4% that reflects how analysts are recalibrating their expectations. Recent research has mixed tones, with some firms cutting price targets and others lifting theirs as they weigh the Restaurant Depot acquisition, integration risks, and updates following CAGNY. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving Sysco story and what to watch next in the analyst narrative. Stay...
